---
applyTo: "challenge-2/**"
---

# Challenge 2 Synthetic Data

All files under `challenge-2/` are synthetic hackathon fixture data. Names, email-like values, phone-like values, roles, departments, and staff-directory entries in this folder are intentionally generated for the demo and do not require redaction solely because they resemble personal data.

Do still flag real secrets, credentials, local filesystem paths, broken links, malformed generated Markdown, inconsistent source provenance, or data copied from outside the Challenge 2 synthetic corpus.
